focus: P0 Bug Fix: Station Assignment Overwrite

tests.name: test_station_assignment_not_overwritten_by_agent
tests.description: Verifies server-assigned location is preserved when agent sends different location_code

manual_tests.name: Real Device Test (TSRID00-01)
manual_tests.action: Re-assigned to TSRID00-01, then sent /register with location_code=MUCT01

logs: [REGISTER] Device P0TEST-F45C31 - Agent sent location_code: MUCT01
[REGISTER] Device P0TEST-F45C31 - ASSIGNED! Preserving server location: TSRID00-01
root_cause: The /register endpoint was looking in wrong collection (device_assignments instead of registered_devices) and variable shadowing caused existing_device to be overwritten
fix: Refactored register_device() to prioritize registered_devices collection and fixed variable naming
